name: performance-analysis
description: Comprehensive performance analysis and optimization plugin with specialized agents for bottleneck detection, complexity analysis, memory profiling, and optimization recommendations.
author: Anthropic

commands.name: perf-analyze
commands.description: Analyze code for performance bottlenecks, complexity issues, memory problems, and optimization opportunities

commands.name: perf-profile
commands.description: Create a detailed performance profile of a specific file or function

commands.name: perf-compare
commands.description: Compare performance characteristics between different versions or branches

agents.name: bottleneck-detective
agents.description: Identifies performance bottlenecks by analyzing code flow, loops, and expensive operations

agents.name: complexity-analyzer
agents.description: Analyzes algorithmic complexity (Big O notation) and recommends optimizations

agents.name: memory-profiler
agents.description: Detects memory leaks, inefficient allocations, and memory-heavy operations

agents.name: concurrency-validator
agents.description: Identifies async/concurrency issues including race conditions and deadlock risks

agents.name: optimization-recommender
agents.description: Suggests practical optimizations with implementation guidance

skills.name: performance-patterns
skills.description: Guide to performance optimization patterns and anti-patterns

skills.name: profiling-tools
skills.description: Reference guide for language-specific profiling tools and techniques
